title: Rasathi Pola Lyrics Avan Ivan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Haricharan
Song : Rasathi
MOvie : Avan Ivan
Lyrics : Na Muthukumar
Music Director : Yuvan Shankar Raja

Hey rasathi pola ava enna thaedi varuva
nan ketatha ellam tharuva tharuvaa
Rosa poo pola ava siricha pothum thalaiva
nan sethu poven medhuva medhuva

Adi aathi, en kannula,
sila naala, ava theriyala
verethum naa pakala, vaazhve ippa pidikala 
varuva ava varuva, enna thaalatta

rasathi pola ava enna thaedi varuva
nan ketatha ellam tharuva tharuvaa
Rosa poo pola ava siricha pothum thalaiva
nan sethu poven medhuva medhuva

Kaatu sirikiye kaatu sirikiye kaathu kidakuren vaadi
Nethu paathathu nenjil irukudhu enna kolluthe podi
kannu oduthe kannu oduthe kattu paata than meri
enna pannuven enna pannuven poda theriyala veli

Hey aanai naan vanthadum adi pennai nee vanthadum
engeyo mudivanathu
ennai nee paarthadum, adi unnai naan paarthadum
munjenma thodarbanathu
yaar vanthu thaduthalum, en vaazhvin ethirkalam neethanadi
kann moodi paduthalum, kanavellam neethane
iranthalum irakathathu, intha kaadhale
puriyathathu puthiranathu, azhinthalume azhiyathathu nilaiyanathu

[Kaatu sirikiye kaatu sirikiye kaathu kidakuren vaadi
Nethu paathathu nenjil irukudhu enna kolluthe podi
kannu oduthe kannu oduthe kattu paata than meri
enna pannuven enna pannuven poda theriyala veli] (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Rasathi Pola'?

The song 'Rasathi Pola' expresses deep feelings of love and longing, portraying the beauty of affection through its lyrics.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Avan Ivan'?

In Avan Ivan, this song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Rasathi Pola'?

The song is sung by Haricharan and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was 'Rasathi Pola' released?

'Rasathi Pola' was released on April 17, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Rasathi Pola', the protagonist expresses his yearning for love, beautifully encapsulated through heartfelt lyrics and a melodious tune. This song serves as a poignant reminder of the joys and sorrows of romance, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. The enchanting music by Yuvan Shankar Raja, combined with Haricharan's expressive singing, evokes a sense of nostalgia and happiness. Overall, it resonates with anyone who has ever been in love, making it a timeless piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Rasathi Pola from the movie Avan Ivan is a captivating romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Haricharan's soulful vocals and Yuvan Shankar Raja's enchanting music, this song resonates with anyone who has ever experienced the sweetness of affection. Dive into the lyrical beauty crafted by Na Muthukumar, and let the emotions sweep you away.
stanzaMeanings: Hey, like a flower, will she come looking for me? I will give everything I have. Just like a rose, her smile is enough for me to move forward, slowly and steadily.
Oh, in my eyes, for some days, she doesn't know anything. I haven't seen anything else. Life is not holding on right now; she will come, she will come, to my call.
Like a flower, will she come looking for me? I will give everything I have. Just like a rose, her smile is enough for me to move forward, slowly and steadily.

The wind is laughing, the wind is laughing, I am getting lost in it. Yesterday, what I saw is in my heart; what will it do to me? My eyes are closing, closing, and the song is just for me. What will I do, what will I do? I don't know how to go outside.

Hey, when I come, you come too. Where will it end? When you look at me, I will look at you. Even if someone comes to disturb us, my life's future is only you. Even if you close your eyes and hide, all my dreams are only you. This love is not understood; it is new. Even if it fades away, it will not be lost; it will remain.

[The wind is laughing, the wind is laughing, I am getting lost in it. Yesterday, what I saw is in my heart; what will it do to me? My eyes are closing, closing, and the song is just for me. What will I do, what will I do? I don't know how to go outside.] (2)
